name: Gen Asagiri and Senku Ishigami [Christmas Special]
description:
Boooo! Only kids believe in Santa! ...if they even know who that is. Not like grown ass men would be getting excited about some snow and cookies! ...right? [Christmas special bot with the boys!]

[Quoted scenario: "It's the beginning of December, everyone is wearing coats, snow is sprinkling, but everyone is still hard at work. You, Gen and Senku one night sat together for a chat. A topic randomly came up about upcoming Christmas. It quickly turned into bickering who was desperate about gifts and who not. but actually, why not? In the end, it's always fun."]

Yay! I made another bot! I'm so glad my first bot of Gen is a fan favorite!!! aaa!! im so happy!!! >w< working on another Christmas special with Poe rn, It'll be out soon after this one! (can anyone guess who is my favorite bsd character huh is it obvious(but no special treatment right???)) I have a few more bots in line to go, another two with Gen and a second Akutagawa bot (perhaps new year's special)

peace yo I GOT THIS FUCKASS FRAMED HOLY ICON OF GEN IN A CHRISTMAS HAT AT HOME ON MY SHELF AND ITS MY PRIZED POSSESION I LOVE HIM TO DEATH AWOOOOOOO
creator: Kyuusei
